creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
I use Poudriere to crossbuild packages for i386. This works well as intended except for lame now.

Now I fetched lame-3.100.tar.gz to a i386 system and built lame there, not using the ports tree.

./configure
make all install

... and lame works!! 

What does that mean now??
